category_sources: source_facts.description says these are tools for managing libosinfo database files; official libosinfo.org describes OS, hypervisor, virtual hardware metadata used for provisioning and managing virtualized environments.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osinfo-db-tools; official GitLab project is named osinfo-db-tools.
docs_sources: Official libosinfo download page documents osinfo-db-tools deployment and states it manages installation, bundling, and distribution of database files; official GitLab project links README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitLab project page at gitlab.com/libosinfo/osinfo-db-tools identifies the osinfo-db-tools project and describes it as tools for managing libosinfo database files.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists osinfo-db-export/import/path/validate; official libosinfo.org describes the database as OS, hypervisor, and virtual hardware metadata for virtualized environments.
